_meta.description: Curated reference tokens for /why-token advisory skill. Maintained by Chase Wang.
_meta.notes: Update this file via Claude Code by pulling from the GitHub repo. Future: replace with API.

tokens.name: Dogecoin
tokens.summary: Started as a joke, built lasting community through meme culture and accessibility. Proved that community IS the product for attention-driven tokens.
tokens.lesson: Community engagement can sustain a token long-term even without formal value accrual — but it's the exception, not the rule.

tokens.name: Pepe
tokens.summary: Pure memecoin leveraging existing internet culture. Rapid community formation, no pretense of utility — honest about what it is.
tokens.lesson: Authenticity matters. Being honest about having no utility is more respected than faking it.

tokens.name: Fartcoin
tokens.summary: Demonstrates that absurdist branding can work when liquidity and timing align. Low-effort thesis, high-effort execution on launch mechanics.
tokens.lesson: Launch mechanics execution matters more than the thesis for attention-driven tokens.

tokens.name: Ethereum
tokens.summary: EIP-1559 introduced fee burning proportional to network usage, directly tying token scarcity to protocol activity. The canonical example of value accrual through burn mechanics.
tokens.lesson: Value accrual can be added after launch. ETH launched without a burn mechanism — EIP-1559 came years later when the network had real usage to capture.

tokens.name: BNB
tokens.summary: Quarterly burns tied to Binance's exchange revenue plus utility as gas token on BNB Chain. Dual value accrual: revenue-linked burns + network utility.
tokens.lesson: Tying burns to real revenue creates a transparent, verifiable value accrual mechanism. Exchange tokens work when the exchange has real volume.

tokens.name: Pump.fun
tokens.summary: Platform fees flow directly to token holders. Simple, direct revenue capture — token value is tied to platform usage.
tokens.lesson: The simplest value accrual mechanisms are often the most effective. If users pay fees and the token captures them, the story is easy to tell.

tokens.name: Kite AI
tokens.summary: Clean launch execution with strong initial liquidity and community coordination. Example of getting the mechanics right independent of token thesis.
tokens.lesson: Even with a strong product, a sloppy launch can kill momentum. Execution on launch day is its own discipline.

tokens.name: Solana
tokens.summary: Long development runway with fundamentals-first approach. Token launched when the network was ready, not when hype demanded it.
tokens.lesson: Patience pays. Launching when the product is ready — not when the market is hot — builds a stronger foundation.

tokens.name: Bittensor
tokens.summary: Decentralized AI network with mining-based token distribution. Unique launch mechanism tied to the product's core function.
tokens.lesson: When your token distribution mechanism IS the product (mining = providing AI compute), the token and the product are inseparable.

tokens.name: Uniswap
tokens.summary: Retroactive airdrop to protocol users. Strategic timing, no public sale — turned existing users into token holders overnight.
tokens.lesson: You don't always need a sale. Rewarding existing users creates instant alignment and massive goodwill.
